articles.title: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Holds Steady to July 15, 2014
articles.excerpt: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to July 15, 2014; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.

articles.title: Cameron Green Set to Bowl in KKR vs LSG IPL 2026 Match
articles.what_this_means: Cameron Green is finally bowling again for KKR in IPL 2026 against LSG on Thursday. This is huge for KKR's squad balance, which has been damaged by injuries all season. Green's return as a dual-threat all-rounder could be the turning point the team needs. US-based fans can catch the action on Willow TV or Sling TV.

articles.title: AI Tools for Developers 2026: Top ChatGPT Alternatives
articles.what_this_means: The AI tools landscape for developers has matured in 2026. ChatGPT alternatives like Claude, Cursor, and Copilot X now dominate specialized workflows. Indian engineers proficient with 3+ AI tools report 12-18% higher salaries and faster promotions. Learning these tools is measurable career leverage.

articles.title: Molineux Captaincy Call: T20 World Cup Will Be the Real Test
articles.what_this_means: Molineux's captaincy is a high-stakes gamble that will be validated or questioned based solely on T20 World Cup results. Selector Flegler backs him despite injury concerns, confirming his bowling return is on schedule. For Indian cricket fans tracking 2026's biggest moments, this is a captaincy story that'll define the entire tournament cycle.

articles.title: Bumrah & Mumbai Indians Stunned by Sooryavanshi in IPL 2025
articles.what_this_means: Yashasvi Jaiswal and Vaibhav Sooryavanshi smashed Mumbai Indians in IPL 2025, leaving even Bumrah rattled in Guwahati. This match proves India's young batting talent is ready for the biggest stages. Here's how to watch India cricket highlights from the US.

articles.title: EB-2 India May 2026 Visa Bulletin Prediction: Expect Modest Forward Movement
articles.what_this_means: EB-2 India is expected to move 14-18 days forward in May 2026, bringing the Final Action Date to approximately July 29–August 2, 2026. Retrogression risk remains very low at 8%, with the real danger zone emerging in July-September 2026.

articles.title: Love & War 2026: Bhansali's Strict Security on Ranbir-Alia Set
articles.what_this_means: Sanjay Leela Bhansali is keeping Love & War under extreme security with no-phones policies on set. The 2026 film starring Ranbir Kapoor, Alia Bhatt, and Vicky Kaushal is one of Bollywood's most anticipated projects. Expect a theatrical release with OTT arrival 6-8 weeks later.

articles.title: Ananya Panday's 'Pressure Ko Bolo Bye' Campaign 2025
articles.what_this_means: Ananya Panday and Nick India have launched 'Pressure Ko Bolo Bye,' a mental health campaign helping Indian families manage exam stress through playful, open conversations. Available free on YouTube and via Disney+ Hotstar, it's a meaningful departure from traditional Bollywood content, directly addressing the pressure many Indian students and parents face during exam season.
